source: Trascritto a piena risoluzione (game/assets/cards/country/, carte grandi 745x1040). 33 carte distinte; il mazzo Market contiene ~66 carte (in genere 2 copie ciascuna, art ids country_051..115). market_cost = numero accanto al nome (🔍). top_bonus + research_bonus = box in alto a sx (guadagnati in fase Research). type = colore barra (diplomatic/economic/military/domestic; 'mixed' = piu' azioni).

cards.effect_text: Produce 1 resource type. Then, Get a Growth Card.
cards.effect_text_it: Produce 1 tipo di risorsa. Poi, Get a Growth Card.

cards.effect_text: Improve Relations with 2 Countries on the board.
cards.effect_text_it: Improve Relations con 2 Country sul tabellone.

cards.effect_text: Produce 1 Army. Then, Move up to 3 Armies.
cards.effect_text_it: Produce 1 Armata. Poi, Move fino a 3 Armate.

cards.effect_text: Gain 4 money for each FDI token on your allied Countries. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
cards.effect_text_it: Guadagni 4 money per ogni segnalino FDI sulle tue Country alleate. Poi, Invest in una Country alleata.

cards.effect_text: Choose a Region. Trade, considering that Region's available Countries on the board as allied Countries. Then, Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in that Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Scegli una Regione. Trade, considerando le Country disponibili di quella Regione sul tabellone come Country alleate. Poi, reimposta 1 delle tue Influenza temporanee in quella Regione.

cards.effect_text: Improve Relations with a Country on the board. Then, Invest in that Country or Trade.
cards.effect_text_it: Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone. Poi, Invest in quella Country o Trade.

cards.effect_text: Trash this card when you play it. Research a card costing up to 6 Research for free and immediately Play it.
cards.effect_text_it: Scarta definitivamente questa carta quando la giochi. Research una carta che costa fino a 6 Research gratuitamente e giocala immediatamente.

cards.effect_text: Trade. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
cards.effect_text_it: Trade. Poi, Invest in una Country alleata.

cards.effect_text: Produce 1 Army. Then, Build a Base in an allied Country.
cards.effect_text_it: Produce 1 Armata. Poi, Build a Base in una Country alleata.

cards.effect_text: Engage in a Region, spending 1 Diplomacy less for each allied Country you have from the same Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Engage in una Regione, spendendo 1 Diplomazia in meno per ogni Country alleata che hai della stessa Regione.

cards.effect_text: Improve Relations with a Country on the board. Then, if able, Build a Base in that Country, or Move up to 2 Armies to that Country's Region, even if you don't have a Base there.
cards.effect_text_it: Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone. Poi, se possibile, Build a Base in quella Country, oppure Move fino a 2 Armate verso la Regione di quella Country, anche se non hai una Base lì.

cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards. Then, Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Pesca 2 carte. Poi, gioca un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Improve Relations with a Country on the board, spending 1 Diplomacy less. You can then Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in that Country's Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone, spendendo 1 Diplomazia in meno. Puoi poi reimpostare 1 delle tue Influenza temporanee nella Regione di quella Country.

cards.effect_text: Gain 10 money. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
cards.effect_text_it: Guadagni 10 money. Poi, Invest in una Country alleata.

cards.effect_text: Trade a resource type. (You can either Export or Import it.) Then, Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Trade un tipo di risorsa. (Puoi esportarla o importarla.) Poi, gioca un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Draw 3 cards. You can then discard 2 cards to Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Pesca 3 carte. Puoi poi scartare 2 carte per giocare un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Build a Base in an allied Country. You can choose a Country even if you have already built a Base in it once before (but only once).
cards.effect_text_it: Build a Base in una Country alleata. Puoi scegliere una Country anche se vi hai già costruito una Base una volta in precedenza (ma solo una volta).

cards.effect_text: Invest in an allied Country. You can choose a Country even if you have already invested in it once before (but only once).
cards.effect_text_it: Invest in una Country alleata. Puoi scegliere una Country anche se vi hai già investito una volta in precedenza (ma solo una volta).

cards.effect_text: Move up to 3 Armies. You can then Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in 1 of the Regions you moved your Armies to.
cards.effect_text_it: Move fino a 3 Armate. Puoi poi reimpostare 1 delle tue Influenza temporanee in 1 delle Regioni in cui hai spostato le tue Armate.

cards.effect_text: Ready up to 2 allied Country cards. Then, Engage in a Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Raddrizza fino a 2 carte Country alleate. Poi, Engage in una Regione.

cards.effect_text: Build a Base in an allied Country. You can move up to 3 Armies to its Region, regardless of the Country's value and without paying their move cost.
cards.effect_text_it: Build a Base in una Country alleata. Puoi spostare fino a 3 Armate verso la sua Regione, indipendentemente dal valore della Country e senza pagare il loro costo di movimento.

cards.effect_text: Choose any 2, in any order: Improve Relations with a Country on the board; Trade; Move up to 2 Armies.
cards.effect_text_it: Scegline 2 qualsiasi, in qualsiasi ordine: Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone; Trade; Move fino a 2 Armate.

cards.effect_text: Ready an allied Country. Then, Invest in that Country without exhausting it.
cards.effect_text_it: Raddrizza una Country alleata. Poi, Invest in quella Country senza esaurirla.

cards.effect_text: Choose a resource type. Increase its Production by 1 (if able) and Produce it. Then, Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Scegli un tipo di risorsa. Aumenta la sua Produzione di 1 (se possibile) e Produce. Poi, gioca un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Produce 1 Consumer Goods. Then, you can either increase your Prosperity, spending 2 Consumer Goods less, or Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Produce 1 Beni di Consumo. Poi, puoi aumentare la tua Prosperità, spendendo 2 Beni di Consumo in meno, oppure giocare un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Improve Relations with a Country on the board. You can then Engage in that Country's Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone. Puoi poi Engage nella Regione di quella Country.

cards.effect_text: Build a Base in an allied Country. When adding Influence to its Region as part of the action, you can place it as permanent Influence even if there is no available slot.
cards.effect_text_it: Build a Base in una Country alleata. Quando aggiungi Influenza alla sua Regione come parte dell'azione, puoi piazzarla come Influenza permanente anche se non c'è uno slot disponibile.

cards.effect_text: Engage in a Region, spending 1 Diplomacy less for each Army you have in that Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Engage in una Regione, spendendo 1 Diplomazia in meno per ogni Armata che hai in quella Regione.

cards.effect_text: Draw a card. You can then Trash a card from your hand or your discard pile to Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Pesca una carta. Puoi poi scartare definitivamente una carta dalla tua mano o dalla tua pila degli scarti per giocare un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Gain 2 Diplomacy. Then, Improve Relations with a Country on the board or Engage in a Region.
cards.effect_text_it: Guadagni 2 Diplomazia. Poi, Improve Relations con una Country sul tabellone oppure Engage in una Regione.

cards.effect_text: Choose a Region and Reset 1 of your temporary Influence there. Then, Draw a card and Play another card.
cards.effect_text_it: Scegli una Regione e reimposta 1 delle tue Influenza temporanee lì. Poi, pesca una carta e gioca un'altra carta.

cards.effect_text: Ready an allied Country. You can then search the Country cards on the board of any 1 Region, choose 1 of those Countries, and Improve Relations with it. Shuffle the rest of the cards afterward and reveal the first 2 on the board.
cards.effect_text_it: Raddrizza una Country alleata. Puoi poi cercare tra le carte Country sul tabellone di 1 Regione qualsiasi, scegliere 1 di quelle Country e Improve Relations con essa. Mescola le altre carte in seguito e rivela le prime 2 sul tabellone.

cards.effect_text: Draw a card. Then, Build a Base in an allied Country.
cards.effect_text_it: Pesca una carta. Poi, Build a Base in una Country alleata.
